---
title: "Using AI in Research Projects"
editor: visual
---

**Using AI for My Project**

My research focuses on the adoption of artificial intelligence in public services. At this stage, my primary challenge is refining research questions and navigating a large interdisciplinary literature. I plan to start using AI as a cognitive support tool to organize ideas and explore alternative analytical strategies rather than as a replacement for original thinking.

**AI Model 1: ChatGPT**

I plan to use ChatGPT to translate theoretical concepts into analytical steps, assist with R code development, and clarify methodological tradeoffs. This model is particularly useful for iterative questioning and debugging. However, I will independently verify outputs to avoid over‑reliance.

**AI Model 2: Claude**

I will use this model primarily for literature discovery and summarization, especially in unfamiliar domains. Its ability to point to sources helps me maintain transparency and research integrity.
